title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 47.180 - Bond, where deposited, recorded
text:
47.180.  Bond, where deposited, recorded. — Such bond shall be deposited with the clerk of the county commission of such county, and shall be by him recorded; and such record, or a copy thereof, certified under the seal of such tribunal, shall be evidence in any court of this state, with the same effect as the original.
(RSMo 1939 § 13680) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12021; 1919 § 9423; 1909 § 3640
